page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: General purpose stuff to generate and handle hi-c data in its simplest form.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: A lightweight library that generates and handles Hi-C contact maps in either cooler-compatible 2Dbedgraph or instaGRAAL format.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A lightweight library that generates and handles Hi-C contact maps in either cooler-compatible 2Dbedgraph or instaGRAAL format.
